info.title: ABIS API
info.description: Read-first REST seam over the legacy ABIS database (modernization Phase 2).

get.summary: Rejected (3) / rebanded (7) coils for a job's invoice.
List the action/audit log, newest first.
List carriers / trucking partners (paged, sortable; filter by status).

post.summary: Create a carrier (server-assigned id; requires carrierFullName).

get.summary: Get one carrier by id.
The coil-ownership transfer ledger (optionally scoped to a customer).

post.summary: Record a coil-ownership transfer (issues a certificate; re-points coil ownership).

get.summary: The printable transfer certificate (full customer addresses + coil details).
Coils eligible to transfer, with their current owner (the coil picker).
List raw input coils (paged, filterable, sortable).

post.summary: Create a coil on receipt.

get.summary: Coil inventory weight rollup grouped by alloy or location.
Get one coil by id.

patch.summary: Update a coil's status, location, or notes. Supports If-Match.

get.summary: List a coil's processing history (the jobs that consumed it).
List customers (paged, sortable).

post.summary: Create a customer.

get.summary: Get one customer by id.
List the contacts for a customer.

post.summary: Add a contact to a customer (server-assigned id; requires lastName).

get.summary: Get one customer contact by id.

put.summary: Replace a customer contact (owning customer unchanged). Supports If-Match.

get.summary: List dies/tooling (paged, sortable; filter by status).

post.summary: Create a die/tooling record (server-assigned id; requires dieName).

get.summary: Get one die by id.

put.summary: Replace a die/tooling record. Supports If-Match.

get.summary: List downtime instances, newest first (paged, sortable; filter by abJobNum/shiftNum).

post.summary: Log a downtime instance.

get.summary: Get one downtime instance by id.

put.summary: Replace a downtime instance. Supports If-Match.

get.summary: List outbound EDI transactions, newest first (paged, sortable; filter by customerId/transactionTypeId).
Get one outbound EDI transaction by its EDI file id.
List EDI transmission-log entries, newest first (paged, sortable; filter by customerId).
List production jobs (paged, filterable by status, sortable).

post.summary: Create a production job.

get.summary: Get one production job by id.

patch.summary: Update a job's status, notes, men, or finish time. Supports If-Match.

get.summary: List the coils a job has processed.
List the finished sheet skids produced by a job.
List the scrap skids generated by a job.
List a job's in-process partial skids.
List shop-floor scan events for a job.
List distinct alloys (reference data for dropdowns).
List production lines (referenced by jobs, coils, downtime).
List maintenance groups/departments (referenced by maintenance logs).
List downtime causes/reasons (master data for the downtime feature).
List transportation method codes (referenced by shipments).
List shipping equipment type codes (referenced by shipments).
List customer classifications (referenced by customers).
List EDI transaction-set types and X12 versions (table edi_type).
List customer EDI trading-partner configuration (table customer_edi).
List maintenance log entries, newest first (paged, sortable; filter by status/groupDepartmentId).

post.summary: Create a maintenance log entry (requires probDateTime, probDetails, author).

get.summary: Get one maintenance log entry by id.

put.summary: Replace a maintenance log entry. Supports If-Match.

get.summary: Service info, version, and links.
Liveness probe — the process is up.
Readiness probe — verifies database connectivity (503 when unreachable).
Browser OIDC client config (or { oidc:false } to use the API-key field).
OPC log sessions.
Captured OPC readings (host/device/item/value/quality) for a log.
The distinct OPC item names seen — the real tag catalog (informs Edge:Opc:Tags).
List order line items (paged, sortable).
Get one order line item by its composite key (order + line number).

put.summary: Replace an order line item (by order + line number). Supports If-Match.

post.summary: Add a line item to an order (line number assigned per order).

get.summary: List the line items for an order.
List customer orders (paged, filterable, sortable).

post.summary: Create an order header.

get.summary: Get one order header by id.

put.summary: Replace an order header. Supports If-Match.

get.summary: Get an order with its customer and line items (order-entry read model).

post.summary: Create an order header and its line items in one transaction.

get.summary: List part-number master records (paged, sortable; filter by customerId/alloy).

post.summary: Create a part-number record (server-assigned id; requires customerId).

get.summary: Get one part-number record by id.

put.summary: Replace a part-number record. Supports If-Match.

get.summary: The scrap/defect type catalog.
The product-type lookup.
Customers configured for recovery reporting.
The scrap/defect types a customer tracks.
List inbound receiving BOLs (paged, sortable; filter by customerId/status).

post.summary: Create an inbound receiving BOL (requires bol and customerId).

get.summary: Get one receiving BOL by id.

put.summary: Replace a receiving BOL. Supports If-Match.

get.summary: A receiving BOL with its coil line items (header + lines).
The coil line items on a receiving BOL.

post.summary: Add a coil line to a receiving BOL (coil_id assigned server-side).

delete.summary: Remove a coil line from a receiving BOL.

get.summary: Per-line production summary (job count, avg yield, processed weight) over an optional date range.
Per-line efficiency: jobs, processed weight, avg yield, and downtime (events + minutes).
Production rolled up by month (YYYY-MM): jobs touched + processed weight.
Downtime events over a window (optionally one line), with computed duration minutes.
Per-line on-time delivery (jobs finished on/before due date) over an optional window.
Per-customer shipment roll-up (total / shipped / open + last ship date).
Open (not-yet-sent) shipments with customer, carrier, and scheduled date.
Customer orders with PO / sales-order references (optionally one customer).
Per-customer finished sheet-skid counts + total net weight.
Pending sales / quote list (customer, contact, latest win probability).
A quote header (a specific revision of a quote).
The sales contact address book (optionally filtered to a customer).
Scheduled follow-ups / reminders for a quote.

post.summary: Log a follow-up / reminder against a quote.

get.summary: Win-probability review history for a quote.

post.summary: Record a win-probability review on a quote.

get.summary: List shop-floor scan events, newest first (paged, sortable; filter by abJobNum).

post.summary: Record a shop-floor scan event (append-only; requires abJobNum, scanStation, note).

get.summary: Get one scan event by id.
The application user roster.

post.summary: Create an application user.

get.summary: One application user.
The groups a user belongs to.
A user's effective per-feature permissions (MAX of direct + group grants).
The security groups / roles.

post.summary: Create a security group.

get.summary: The protected feature catalog.

post.summary: Create a protected feature.

put.summary: Set a user's privilege on a feature (0 = ReadOnly, 1 = Write).
Set a group's privilege on a feature (0 = ReadOnly, 1 = Write).

post.summary: Add a user to a group.

delete.summary: Remove a user from a group.

get.summary: List production shifts, newest first (paged, sortable; filter by lineNum).

post.summary: Create a production shift.

get.summary: Get one shift by id.

put.summary: Replace a production shift. Supports If-Match.

get.summary: List shipments / packing lists (paged, sortable; filter by customerId).

post.summary: Create a shipment header (packing-list and bill-of-lading numbers server-assigned).

get.summary: Get one shipment by packing-list number.

put.summary: Replace a shipment header (packing-list and bill-of-lading numbers preserved). Supports If-Match.

patch.summary: Update a shipment's dispatch status (status, vehicle status, sent/actual times, notes). Supports If-Match.

get.summary: List part sketches/drawings (paged, sortable; filter by status). Excludes the binary image.

post.summary: Create a sketch header (server-assigned id; requires sketchName; image not written via API).

get.summary: Get one sketch header by id (no image).

put.summary: Replace a sketch header (image left untouched). Supports If-Match.

get.summary: List finished sheet skids (paged, sortable).

post.summary: Create a finished sheet skid.

get.summary: Get one sheet skid by id.
List scrap skids (paged, sortable).

post.summary: Create a scrap skid.

get.summary: Get one scrap skid by id.
List in-process partial skids (paged, sortable).
List posted mechanical test results (paged, filterable, sortable).
List in-progress (working-set) mechanical test results.

patch.summary: Warehouse update of a sheet skid (location / ticket / status).

ApiKey.description: API key sent in the X-Api-Key header.
ApiKey.name: X-Api-Key

Bearer.description: JWT bearer token from your OIDC provider (when Auth:Jwt is configured).
